texto: Robots are like Mars: they needgirls. Boys won't do
autor: the memesoup is all wrong. They stompwhen they should kissand they're none too keenon having things shoved inside them...It's not a robotuntil you put a girl inside. Sometimes I feel like that. A junkyard the Company forgot to put a girl in.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a the memesoup is all wrong. They stompwhen they should kissand they're none too keenon having things shoved inside them...It's not a robotuntil you put a girl inside. Sometimes I feel like that. A junkyard the Company forgot to put a girl in.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Robots are like Mars: they needgirls. Boys won't do” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, catherynne-m-valente, the-melancholy-of-mechagirl pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de the-melancholy-of-mechagirl.
